channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I've been using the Dreame Z50 Station self-emptying cordless vacuum for weeks – its performance should have Dyson and Shark worried
item.description: The Dreame Z50 Station has an industry-leading 330AW of suction and it puts every bit of it to excellent use. Its weight is its only downfall.

item.title: Before quantum computing arrives, this startup wants enterprises already running on it
item.description: After selling his AI startup to AMD for $665 million, Peter Sarlin is back with QuTwo, a new venture building the infrastructure it believes enterprises will need when quantum computing finally arrives.

item.title: Why your best ideas get ignored during meetings
item.description: Great ideas don’t fail because they’re wrong. They fail because they arrive at the wrong moment or threaten the group dynamic. You’re at your usual weekly team meeting. The team leader asks for ideas, and you immediately come up with the best one. It’s not just clever. It’s perfect. You rush to say it, glowing with anticipation. Silence. Nobody reacts. You walk out deflated, wondering how a group of smart people could ignore the obvious answer....

item.title: Truecaller now lets you hang up on scammers — on behalf of your family
item.description: Caller identity platform Truecaller recently launched a new feature that lets one person become an admin of a family group, get alerts about fraud calls received by other members, and even end a call on their behalf if they suspect a family member might get scammed. The company, which has over 450 million users, first […]

item.title: Cornbread Mafia review: True crime meets stoner comedy in this outrageous documentary
item.description: True crime meets stoner comedy in outrageous documentary "Cornbread Mafia," which is playing at SXSW. Review.

item.title: A Safe Distance review: Dont overlook this sexy, sapphic thriller
item.description: 'A Safe Distance' review: Influenced by Patricia Highsmith, this sexy, sapphic thriller is the directorial debut of Gloria Mercer.
